data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Updated SKILL.md Step 1 (Detect Conflicts) to: (1) source merge-state.sh, (2) use ms_get_conflicted_files() instead of bare git diff --name-only --diff-filter=U, (3) use ms_is_merge_in_progress() instead of inline test -f MERGE_HEAD. MERGE_HEAD still referenced in comment for context (preserves existing test).
